prompt: This is an AND gate. I wonder — what happens if you turn switch A on?
Here's an AND gate. What do you think happens when you turn A on?
feedback: Still dark! AND needs both switches. Try turning B on too.
Hmm — A is on but the lamp is still out. AND needs both. Try B!
Both on — the lamp lights up! AND only works when both switches are on. Turn A off — what do you think happens?
Yes! Both on, lamp glows. AND needs them both. Now turn A off — what will happen?
The lamp goes out! AND stops the moment one switch turns off. Both must be on.
Out! One switch off and it stops. That's what AND means — both!
